title: Spike Spencers Ep26 Monologue
wikitext:
[]: Spike Spencer's Ep.26 Monologue             Quote Post by FallenTabris » Sat Apr 05, 2008 6:52 pm I'm referring to his voiceover, where Shinji expresses his discontent and confusion at the ending.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sat Apr 05, 2008 10:08 pm try youtube

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Apr 06, 2008 1:58 am http://shinjismind.ytmnd.com/

[]:             Quote Post by V » Sun Apr 06, 2008 9:33 am I remember seeing this on YTMND, but what part of the DVDs was it originally in?

[]:             Quote Post by Indigo Arcangel » Sun Apr 06, 2008 3:13 pm Basically, on the last platinum episode, start with Japanese language on, then switch to English when it gets to the credits.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr JeburtO » Mon Apr 07, 2008 9:06 am am i the only one who found this hilarious?

[]:             Quote Post by Dartz » Mon Apr 07, 2008 1:09 pm It's always been hilarious. It always will be. It lets us know we wren't the only ones to go WTF? We are not alone.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Mon Apr 07, 2008 1:10 pm Heh, yeah, it is awesome I'M ON A BIG BLUE BALL

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Mon Apr 07, 2008 1:48 pm Dartz wrote: It lets us know we wren't the only ones to go WTF?

[]:             Quote Post by Dartz » Mon Apr 07, 2008 1:58 pm BobBQ wrote: Dartz wrote: It lets us know we wren't the only ones to go WTF?

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Mon Apr 07, 2008 3:55 pm Dartz wrote: I watched the show while drunk and in a depression. I think I can safely say I somewhat understood sweet frack all. Or at least, I don't remember understanding it. I think I may have at the time. For one brief moment of absolute clarity, I held the zen truth in my hand...

[]:             Quote Post by Dartz » Mon Apr 07, 2008 3:58 pm Zuggy wrote: There are probably a few people in this world who understand NGE, but you'd never realise what they had achieved by speaking with them because they just chop wood and carry water.

[]: Shinji's Inner Thoughts in EoTV 26             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Wed Mar 11, 2009 10:00 pm [I'll just merge this into the old thread since it has a new link.] Very funny. This was an Easter egg in the platinum DVD. http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oL8pvC3mxGo He actually says some of the stuff some people were actually thinking after the TV ending.

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Wed Mar 11, 2009 10:19 pm "Does the bus run through here?"

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Thu Mar 12, 2009 9:51 am "what do I eat?" LULZ

[]:             Quote Post by Dartz » Thu Mar 12, 2009 10:17 am "And isn't that the youtube link everybody's seen already"

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Thu Mar 12, 2009 1:16 pm you ran outta ink didn't ya, ya bastards!

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Mar 12, 2009 1:32 pm Should somebody just post a transcript of the entire thing?

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Thu Mar 12, 2009 2:40 pm Here ya go, compliments of wikiquote Spike Spencer wrote: "Oh this is… this is nice, this is the end, okay. Where exactly am I? Oh great… here's the song, oh good. Um, there's some things that are still unresolved here, guys! How do I get home? What do I eat? Was Rei my-my mom? Or a clone? Or, hell, was this all in my mind? Wha-what's an EVA? Is that sort of a Freudian thing? Er… um Am I real? Oh, hell, does a bus run through here? I mean, I'd like to go home now but um… Oh God… Where's home? Okay, okay, okay. I mustn't run away, I mustn't run… Okay I got that, good, okay. Now, if I were to run away, let's analyze that: Where the fuck would I go? I'm on a big blue ball! Uhh, is this how you end the series? I mean, is this where we go from here? Okay, the movie better sure as Hell make up for this, I'm telling you right now, 'cause I'm stuck in Nowhereland! You ran outta ink too, didn't you, ya bastards?"

[]:             Quote Post by Mr.Sexy » Tue Apr 07, 2009 3:27 am I just found this on my platinum Dvd the other day. I think the acronym LMFAO pretty much sums up my reaction.

Article: Spike Spencers Ep26 Monologue
: "Oh this is… this is nice, this is the end, okay. Where exactly am I? Oh great… here's the song, oh good. Um, there's some things that are still unresolved here, guys! How do I get home? What do I eat? Was Rei my-my mom? Or a clone? Or, hell, was this all in my mind? Wha-what's an EVA? Is that sort of a Freudian thing? Er… um Am I real? Oh, hell, does a bus run through here? I mean, I'd like to go home now but um… Oh God… Where's home? Okay, okay, okay. I mustn't run away, I mustn't run… Okay I got that, good, okay. Now, if I were to run away, let's analyze that: Where the fuck would I go? I'm on a big blue ball! Uhh, is this how you end the series? I mean, is this where we go from here? Okay, the movie better sure as Hell make up for this, I'm telling you right now, 'cause I'm stuck in Nowhereland! You ran outta ink too, didn't you, ya bastards?"
